function.name: design_color
function.description: Generate color palettes, check contrast ratios, create dark mode variants, and define semantic color systems. Uses HSL manipulation and WCAG contrast math. Default aesthetic: Warm Organic.

action.description: Action to perform. generate_palette: create full palette from base color. check_contrast: WCAG contrast ratio between two colors. dark_mode: generate dark variant of a palette. semantic_colors: map palette to semantic roles.

base_color.description: Base color in hex (e.g. '#E8956D') or HSL (e.g. 'hsl(18, 75%, 67%)'). Required for generate_palette and dark_mode.

palette.description: Existing palette object for dark_mode or semantic_colors action.

harmony.description: Color harmony type for generate_palette. Default: analogous.

function.name: design_typography
function.description: Generate type scales, font pairings, line-height calculations, and letter-spacing (tracking). Uses modular scale ratios and golden ratio math.

action.description: Action to perform. type_scale: generate modular scale. font_pairing: get curated font combinations. line_height: calculate optimal line-height. tracking: calculate letter-spacing.

base_size.description: Base font size in px for type_scale. Default: 16.

ratio.description: Scale ratio for type_scale. Default: major-third.

steps_up.description: Steps above base for type_scale. Default: 6.

steps_down.description: Steps below base for type_scale. Default: 2.

font_size.description: Font size in px for line_height and tracking calculations.

content_type.description: Content type for line_height calculation. Default: body.

function.name: design_layout
function.description: Generate grid systems, spacing scales, responsive breakpoints, and container specifications. Uses 4px/8px grid math.

action.description: Action to perform. grid_system: generate column grid. spacing_scale: create spacing tokens. breakpoints: responsive breakpoint definitions. container: max-width container specs.

gutter.description: Gutter width in px (snapped to 4px grid). Default: 24.

margin.description: Outer margin in px (snapped to 4px grid). Default: 32.

max_width.description: Max container width in px. Default: 1280.

base.description: Base spacing unit in px for spacing_scale. Default: 4.

padding.description: Container inline padding in px. Default: 32.

function.name: design_component
function.description: Generate component structures, props APIs, variant styles, and framework-specific code output. Supports React, Vue, Svelte, and vanilla HTML. Warm Organic styling defaults.

action.description: Action to perform. structure: component anatomy and slots. props_api: TypeScript interface and prop definitions. variants: all variant styles. code_output: framework-specific code.

framework.description: Target framework for code_output. Default: react.

variant.description: Specific variant for code_output (e.g. 'primary', 'secondary', 'ghost'). Default: primary.

function.name: design_audit
function.description: WCAG accessibility checks, contrast audits, ARIA guidance, and design token generation/conversion. Supports W3C DTCG JSON, Tailwind, CSS variables, SCSS, and JS/TS exports.

action.description: Action to perform. wcag_check: check element against WCAG criteria. contrast_audit: batch contrast check for color pairs. aria_guidance: ARIA attributes for a component. generate_tokens: convert design values to token formats.

properties.description: Element properties for wcag_check (e.g. {font_size: 14, color: '#333', background: '#fff'}).

color_pairs.description: Array of {name, foreground, background} for contrast_audit.

tokens.description: Design tokens object for generate_tokens (W3C DTCG format input).

format.description: Output format for generate_tokens. Default: all.

function.name: design_flow
function.description: Generate user flow diagrams (Mermaid), heuristic evaluations (Nielsen's 10), and UX copy suggestions. Pure logic, no external dependencies.

action.description: Action to perform. user_flow: generate Mermaid flowchart. heuristic_eval: evaluate against Nielsen's heuristics. ux_copy: generate UX microcopy.

flow_name.description: Name of the user flow for user_flow action.

steps.description: Flow steps for user_flow. Each step has id, label, type, and next (array of next step IDs).

context.description: Context for heuristic_eval: {product, screen, description, issues (optional array)}.

copy_type.description: Type of UX copy to generate.

tone.description: Tone for UX copy. Default: friendly (Warm Organic).
